category_sources: Official LCDF Type Software page describes Type 1 utilities as free UNIX/Windows command-line tools for dealing with Type 1 fonts.
source_facts.description says it provides command-line tools for Type 1 fonts.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the project name T1utils.
docs_sources: Official LCDF page labels the GitHub repository as source code and documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official LCDF Type Software page.
repo_sources: Official LCDF Type Software page links Type 1 utilities source code and documentation to https://github.com/kohler/t1utils.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes PFA/PFB conversion, disassembly, and reassembly tools.
source_facts.description identifies command-line tools for Type 1 fonts.
source_facts.executables lists t1ascii, t1asm, t1binary, t1disasm, t1mac, and t1unmac.
